channel.title: Oracle EBS on PolloChang 工作筆記
channel.description: Recent content in Oracle EBS on PolloChang 工作筆記

item.title: Oracle EBS set change Password with SQL
item.description: SET SERVEROUTPUT ON DECLARE v_success BOOLEAN; BEGIN v_success := fnd_user_pkg.ChangePassword( username => 'SYSADMIN', newpassword => 'P@ssW0rd' ); IF v_success THEN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Change Success!'); COMMIT; ELSE DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('Change Fail!'); ROLLBACK; END IF; END; /
